author: gartung
body:
This takes the json output of edmModuleEventAllocMonitorAnalyze.py and writes out a circles formatted json file. Example output can be viewed at 
https://gartung.web.cern.ch/circles/web/piechart.php?colours=default&data_name=data&dataset=step3_moduleEventAllocMonitor_circles&groups=packages&local=false&resource=temp&show_labels=true&show_animations=true&threshold=0
title: Perftools/AllocMonitor: add script to generate module event alloc monitor circles json file.
